title: Páginas de Leaks, EV, Range e Tilt
plan: Add period filter support to cash.py and tournament.py route handlers for leaks/ev/range/tilt tabs
Create prepare_leaks_data() in data.py with health score bar calculation, top 5 leaks sorting by cost bb/100, study spots prioritization, and period comparison logic
Create prepare_ev_data() in data.py integrating EV line vs Real line, decision tree EV by street, EV leaks, bb/100 real vs EV, and red/blue line chart data
Create prepare_range_data() in data.py with hand matrix 13x13 generation per position, ideal range overlay data, and top 10 profitable/deficit hands
Create prepare_tilt_data() in data.py with tilt session detection, 24h hourly heatmap data, duration analysis, post-bad-beat analysis, and session recommendations
Create prepare_sizing_data() in data.py with pot-type segmentation and sizing distributions per street
Enhance cash/leaks.html template: health score bar, top 5 leaks with cost bb/100, study spots section, period comparison, period filter controls
Enhance cash/ev.html template: EV line vs Real line SVG chart, decision tree EV by street, EV leaks table, bb/100 comparison, red/blue line chart section, period filter
Rewrite cash/range.html template: 13x13 hand matrix with position tabs, ideal range overlay styling, top 10 profitable/deficit hands tables, period filter
Enhance cash/tilt.html template: tilt sessions table, 24h CSS grid heatmap, duration analysis section, post-bad-beat detection, session recommendation, period filter
Create cash/sizing.html template with pot-type segmentation and sizing distribution charts per street with period filter
Mirror all cash templates to tournament templates (leaks, ev, range, tilt, sizing)
Add sizing tab to navigation in app.py and VALID_TABS in routes
Add CSS styles for hand matrix 13x13 grid, heatmap cells, health score bar, chart containers, sizing distribution bars
Add JS helpers for chart rendering, tab switching, period filter toggling, and interactive elements
Run quality gates: typecheck, lint, tests, build verification
